title: MYB
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: LastPass Issues New Account Password Warning—Attacks Are Underway
items.description: LastPass has confirmed a new and ongoing attack that began on March 1 and targets user account credentials. Here’s what you need to know and do.

items.title: The Uncanny Valley

items.title: A Biologist Explains What The First Eyes On Earth Could See. Hint: They Were Made Of Crystal
items.description: Half a billion years ago, the first true eye emerged in Earth’s oceans. Fossils now reveal what that ancient crystal vision could actually see.

items.title: Critical Android Update—Google And CISA Confirm 0-Day Device Attacks
items.description: Google has confirmed a new and actively exploited zero-day security vulnerability targeting Android users.
